name: Push-up
description: A bodyweight exercise that targets the chest, shoulders, and triceps.

name: Incline Push-up
description: Push-up variation with hands elevated to target upper chest.

name: Decline Push-up
description: Push-up variation with feet elevated to emphasize lower chest.

name: Bench Press
description: Classic barbell exercise for chest, shoulders, and triceps.

name: Incline Bench Press
description: Targets the upper chest using a barbell on an inclined bench.

name: Decline Bench Press
description: Barbell press on a decline bench to emphasize lower chest.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Uses dumbbells for greater range of motion than barbell bench press.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Incline bench variation with dumbbells to isolate the upper chest.

name: Decline Dumbbell Press
description: Dumbbell press on decline bench for lower chest activation.

name: Dumbbell Fly
description: Isolation exercise for chest using dumbbells in a wide arc.

name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
description: Incline variation of dumbbell fly focusing on upper chest.

name: Cable Crossover
description: Cable machine exercise for isolating chest with constant tension.

name: Incline Cable Fly
description: Cable fly on an incline bench to target upper chest.

name: Decline Cable Fly
description: Cable fly on a decline bench to emphasize lower chest.

name: Chest Dips
description: Dip variation leaning forward to target chest more than triceps.

name: Pec Deck Machine
description: Machine-based chest isolation exercise, also known as butterfly machine.

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
description: Bench press using a Smith machine for stability.

name: Floor Press
description: Bench press variation performed on the floor to reduce shoulder strain.
